use_cases: Displaying promotional announcements or special offers on landing pages
Highlighting new features or product updates to users
Showing discount codes or limited-time offers in marketing sections
Communicating important notices or system status updates
Featuring educational tips or helpful guidance within applications
ai_summary: A promotional banner component built with React, Framer Motion, and class-variance-authority for styling. Features smooth entrance animations and hover scale effects, with a clean design using shadcn/ui conventions. The component accepts title, description, icon, and optional href for linkable banners, making it versatile for announcements, offers, and featured content across SaaS and e-commerce platforms.
